name: The Prince of Tennis II: U-17 World Cup
original_name: 新テニスの王子様 U-17 WORLD CUP
overview: The story follows the unfolding of the U-17 World Cup, which takes place at the KCC Arena, in Melbourne, Australia. A total of 32 countries are participating in this long-awaited competition, and only 16 of them will manage to qualify for the final stages…

trailers.title: Prince of Tennis II: U-17 World Cup | OFFICIAL TRAILER
